name: _GetPEImageBase
asm:
0x1400026F0      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [0x140004460]
  0x1400026F7      XOR      EDX, EDX
  0x1400026F9      CMP      word ptr [RAX], 0x5a4d
  0x1400026FE      JNZ      0x14000270f
  0x140002700      MOVSXD   RCX, dword ptr [RAX + 0x3c]
  0x140002704      ADD      RCX, RAX
  0x140002707      CMP      dword ptr [RCX], 0x4550
  0x14000270D      JZ       0x140002718
  0x14000270F      MOV      RAX, RDX
  0x140002712      RET      
  0x140002718      CMP      word ptr [RCX + 0x18], 0x20b
  0x14000271E      CMOVZ    RDX, RAX
  0x140002722      MOV      RAX, RDX
  0x140002725      RET
